overall.description: Static cinematic shot from a fantasy video game depicting a medieval castle common room with stone walls, wooden balconies, and characters in school robes. The camera is positioned on an upper balcony overlooking a central hearth area with warm natural lighting filtering through stained glass windows.

circular wooden table or stand positioned in the center of the lower level

segments.scene_description: A static view from a balcony inside a medieval common room, showing characters in robes standing near a carved wooden railing. The scene features a large stone fireplace in the background, warm light streaming through stained glass windows, and a curved wooden staircase, creating a cozy, historic atmosphere typical of a fantasy school setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic perspective within a medieval common room, capturing a moment of quiet academic life in a fantasy setting. It begins with a view from an upper balcony, where characters in school robes stand beside a detailed carved wooden railing. The gaze extends past the figures toward a large stone fireplace that anchors the room in a cozy, historic atmosphere. Warm natural light filters through stained glass windows, illuminating the space and highlighting the curve of a wooden staircase that leads down into the heart of the hall.
